snippet.title: Air Supply - Making Love Out of Nothing at All (Lyrics) Letra en español
snippet.description:
🍒 CherryLady 🍒
Bienvenid@ a un viaje directo a la nostalgia ✨
Si amás la música con historia, el estilo retro y esa sensación de “antes todo era distinto”, este canal es para vos.
👉 Seguime para no perderte ningún video

🎶 Air Supply - Making Love Out of Nothing at All (Lyrics) Letra en español

🎤 Air Supply:
📌 https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLIx3q_0KLVHAxgxsvh_vSQ?feature=gws_kp_artist&feature=gws_kp_artist

I know just how to whisper
And I know just how to cry
I know just where to find the answers
And I know just how to lie
I know just how to fake it
And I know just how to scheme
I know just when to face the truth
And then I know just when to dream
And I know just where to touch you
And I know just what to prove
I know when to pull you closer
And I know when to let you loose
And I know the night is fading
And I know the time's gonna fly
And I'm never gonna tell you everything I gotta tell you
But I know I gotta give it a try
And I know the roads to riches
And I know the ways to fame
I know all the rules and then I know how to break 'em
And I always know the name of the game
But I don't know how to leave you
And I'll never let you fall
And I don't know how you do it
Making love out of nothing at all

Streaming through the waves in your hair
And every star in the sky is taking aim at your eyes
Like a spotlight
The beating of my heart is a drum and it's lost
And it's looking for a rhythm like you
You can take the darkness from the pit of the night
And turn it to a beacon burning endlessly bright
I've gotta follow it 'cause everything I know
Well, it's nothing 'til I give it to you
I can make the runner stumble
I can make the final block
I can make every tackle at the sound of the whistle
I can make all the stadiums rock
I can make tonight forever
Or I can make it disappear by the dawn
I can make you every promise that has ever been made
And I can make all your demons be gone
But I'm never gonna make it without you

snippet.title: 🔴 LIVE | MPL ID S17 | Playoffs Grand Finals | English
snippet.description:
👑 THE BATTLE FOR THE KINGFINIX THRONE HAS FINALLY ARRIVED!

After an unforgettable Regular Season and Playoffs filled with surprises, the journey of MPL ID Season 17 comes down to one final match. Only two teams remain, ready to fight for the ultimate prize and the MPL ID S17 Championship.

🔥 ONIC vs Bigetron Esports 🔥

On one side stands ONIC, a team determined to continue its legacy and further cement its status as one of the greatest dynasties in MPL Indonesia history.

On the other side stands Bigetron Esports, carrying the ambition to end ONIC's reign and prove that a new king is ready to rise.

Will ONIC continue their dominance and add another championship to their legacy?

Or will Bigetron Esports break the dynasty and usher in a new era of MPL Indonesia?

Witness the Grand Finals of MPL ID Season 17 and discover who will claim the KINGFINIX Throne!

📅 Sunday, June 14, 2026

snippet.description:
**Sana Di Na Lang Tayo Nagkakilala - Official Lyric Video | TJ HyperMusic**

“Sana Di Na Lang Tayo Nagkakilala” is an emotional Filipino hugot rap song about betrayal, heartbreak, and the pain of loving someone who already had someone else in their heart.

This song is for the person who loved sincerely, fought until the end, and still ended up being left behind. It is about the anger, regret, and pain of realizing that while you were still fighting for the relationship, the other person was already slowly letting go.

Kung alam mo lang na ganito rin ang dulo, sana hindi mo na lang siya pinasok sa puso mo.

From June 6th to June 21st, the world’s top VALORANT teams will battle at Masters London, the second global event of the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour. Twelve teams qualified through Stage 1 tournaments of their respective regional leagues, will compete for Championship Points and a chance to advance toward Champions Shanghai.

We’re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: AWS, Coinbase, EWC, ENC, Globant, HyperX, Mastercard, OMEN, Red Bull, Secretlab, and Verizon.
